vut_cut_policy: VUT used when NEE_VUT_REF_QC >= 0.8; CUT fallback when VUT QC fails or value is -9999
unit_nep_gpp_ter: gC m-2 yr-1 (pre-integrated YY product; NEP = -NEE)
unit_et: mm yr-1 via LE_F_MDS [W m-2] * 31557600 [s yr-1] / lambda [J kg-1]; lambda = 2450000 J/kg. Derivation: 1 kg m-2 = 1 mm depth, so ET [mm yr-1] = LE * secs / lambda.
unit_h: W m-2 (annual mean LE_F_MDS equivalent; not converted)
notes: Distribution of site-median values per IGBP class × flux. cv = sd/|mean| across site medians within each class. spread: tight cv<0.25, moderate cv<0.60, wide cv>=0.60.
